name: Mellow Macaroni and Cheese
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F (190°C).
2. Melt butter in a large saucepan over medium heat.
3. Add onion and sauté for 3 minutes until softened.
4. Stir in flour, cook for 2 minutes, stirring constantly.
5. Whisk in milk, Worcestershire sauce, salt, and pepper; cook and stir until thickened.
6. Remove from heat and stir in cheddar cheese until melted.
7. Add macaroni and sour cream; mix well.
8. Transfer the mixture to a greased 2-quart casserole dish.
9. Sprinkle with seasoned bread crumbs.
10. Bake for 30 minutes, or until bubbly and golden brown.
